title: Programming Foundations
description: Master the basics before DSA touches you. This phase turns you from a complete beginner into someone who can actually write and understand code.

mid_phase_checkpoint.message: You now have Variables + Decisions + Loops + Functions - 60% of all interview questions solved already!

phase_consolidation.title: Phase 1 Consolidation
phase_consolidation.mental_map: Variables -> Loops -> Functions -> Arrays -> Big O
mixed_problems: Write a function that counts numbers greater than average in an array.
Remove vowels from a string and state the time complexity.
Check palindrome using two pointers and analyze space complexity.
Grade calculator using if-else and loops for multiple students.
Find max in array and report steps count.
Swap two variables without extra space.
Count characters in a string using a loop.
Write a function that returns sum of even numbers in array.
Compare two strings and return which is longer.
Predict output of nested loop snippet.
Find second largest element without sorting.
Determine complexity of a loop inside a function.
weak_spot_tasks: 20-min Space Complexity recap: in-place vs extra

linkedin_card.headline: I just finished Programming Foundations on DSA OS - I can now write real code! 🛠️
